recommendations.title: I Got Life!
recommendations.overview: Aurore has separated, just lost her job, and learns that she is going to be a grandmother.

recommendations.title: The Farewell
recommendations.overview: A headstrong Chinese-American woman returns to China when her beloved grandmother is given a terminal diagnosis. Billi struggles with her family's decision to keep grandma in the dark about her own illness as they all stage an impromptu wedding to se

recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in the Great Puppy Adventure
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her sisters, Skipper, Stacie and Chelsea, and their adorable new puppy friends find unexpected mystery and adventure when they return to their hometown of Willows. While going through mementos in Grandma's attic, the sisters discover an ol

recommendations.title: Kapoor & Sons
recommendations.overview: Returning home to visit their ill grandfather, two estranged brothers must confront their unresolved rivalry while their parents’ marriage frays.

recommendations.title: Everyone's Hero
recommendations.overview: A boy begins a grand journey to return Babe Ruth's baseball bat before the deciding game of the 1932 World Series comes to a close.
recommendations.director: Colin Brady, Christopher Reeve, Dan St. Pierre

recommendations.title: The Wizard
recommendations.overview: A boy and his brother run away from home and hitch cross-country, with help from a girl they meet, to compete in the ultimate video-game championship.

recommendations.title: Tetris
recommendations.overview: In 1988, American video game salesman Henk Rogers discovers the video game Tetris. When he sets out to bring the game to the world, he enters a dangerous web of lies and corruption behind the Iron Curtain.

recommendations.title: Love.com
recommendations.overview: It's a love story between a fashion blogger and a video game blogger. The beauty and the nerd.

recommendations.title: Tom at the Farm
recommendations.overview: A young man travels to an isolated farm for his lover's funeral where he's quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lover's aggressive brother.
